name: End-of-Garden Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cucumbers and tomatoes in salt water until ready to use.
2. Grind the remaining ingredients (green peppers, cabbage, onion, carrots, celery) together.
3. Drain the cucumbers and tomatoes from the salt water.
4. Mix all the ingredients together.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil for 20 minutes.
6. Carefully fill clean, sterile bottles with the relish and seal them properly.
